name: Toons Universe!
description: YOU are the newest agent (somehow) at INNOVA! You along with (currently) 12 other agents must traverse down floors to uhhh… collect valuable resources for one of the world’s BIGGEST biotech firms in “their” WORLD!! (Update 3: “I’ve been noticing a lot of complaints about GNR (some aren’t even complaints but are just taking notice of the bot’s confusion about them), so I remade their personalities and made sure they actually HAVE LEGS.”) also thanks for 20K :)
creator: Allthatglitters2200
